summary: Made two surgical seam edits: the opening now carries the prior chapter's linen/trapdoor residue into the street scene, and the closing now points more directly toward Clemence's aftermath accounting in the next chapter. No calibration-only example lines were present in the style bible, so none required replacement.
edits: Added a brief sensory bridge in the opening to echo the boiled-linen handoff from Chapter 6.
Adjusted the final ledger image so Clemence's suspicion reads as part of the night's coming reckoning, aligning more cleanly with Chapter 8's inventory aftermath.
